commit.message:
Add Content Intelligence layer, quality audit fixes, and prompt hardening

CONTENT INTELLIGENCE (Phase A + B + B2)
- New DB models: ContentInsight, ContentPattern, GenerationSession
- ContentExtractor: AI batch-processes research snippets into structured insights
  (subtopic, pain_point, hook_type, audience_segment, key_insight, specificity_score)
- PatternAggregator: SQL GROUP BY aggregation of insights into ContentPattern rows;
  evidence block injection into structured post generation
- Intelligence API (/intelligence): insights, patterns, patterns/for-generation,
  extract, extract-text, status, session logging, preferences, pattern drilldown
- generate_structured() in post_generator.py: structured inputs + evidence injection +
  optional style_examples (Write like my best posts feature)
- structured_post.txt prompt: full anti-slop enforcement, hook instructions,
  evidence discipline, forbidden openers/closers
- content_extractor.txt prompt: structured JSON extraction from raw content
- Scheduler: content extraction job every 4h with jitter
- ContentStudio.jsx: Quick/Structured mode toggle, IntelligencePanel (click-to-fill),
  InsightDrilldownModal (pattern evidence drilldown), Write like my best posts button,
  Learn from Content paste panel, preferences auto-fill, session tracking
- Dashboard.jsx: intelligence status widget (insights count, patterns, backlog)
- scripts/m7_validate.py: M7 runtime validation (9 checks)
- scripts/quality_audit.py: full pipeline quality audit harness

QUALITY AUDIT FIXES (from live pipeline testing)
- post_scorer.txt: whitelist phoenixsolution.in — brand URL no longer triggers -2 penalty;
  only third-party/unrelated URLs are penalised
- post.txt: added FORBIDDEN OPENERS (7 patterns), FORBIDDEN CONCLUSIONS (5 patterns),
  STATISTICS RULE — matches anti-slop enforcement in structured_post.txt
- post.txt: fixed Data Insight style — no longer instructs stat fabrication; uses
  named concrete scenarios instead
- comment_candidate.txt: replaced Angle C 'question' with 'missing piece' angle —
  names what the post gets right but leaves out the hard part; eliminates the
  summarise-then-generic-question failure mode
- reply.txt: added VOICE RULES block — bans generic openers, 15 AI-tell phrases,
  em-dash usage, and hedging language
- settings.yaml: min_comment_score 8 -> 6 for initial deployment
- ContentStudio.jsx: default generation mode changed to structured

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add token usage tracking via agentsview (#525)

## Summary

- Add `internal/tokens` package that shells out to `agentsview token-use
<session-id>` to fetch per-session token consumption (peak context
tokens + total output tokens)
- Store token usage as a JSON blob in `review_jobs.token_usage` (SQLite
migration + PostgreSQL v8 schema)
- Collect token usage automatically after each job completes in the
worker pool (best-effort, skips resumed sessions to avoid cumulative
overcounting)
- Thread `token_usage` through PostgreSQL sync (push and pull paths) so
data is available across machines
- Display token summary in TUI review screen header and `roborev show`
CLI output (e.g. `118.0k ctx · 28.8k out`)
- Add `roborev backfill-tokens` command to retroactively fetch token
data for completed jobs that have session IDs but no stored usage

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

speaking, preventing background noise from being transcribed.

commit.message:
feat: restore and complete KI (Knowledge Index) system

Restore agents/knowledge/ (deleted in v6.9 cleanup) and write the 4
missing KI scripts that package.json references:

- scripts/ki_cache.cjs: shared cache module with TTL (30min), hash-based
  invalidation, CLI (clear/list)
- scripts/auto_generate_ki.cjs: scans agents/knowledge/*.md, generates
  raw cache entries in .cache/ki/
- scripts/compress_ki.cjs: strips code blocks, examples, verbose markdown
  for ~40% token reduction
- scripts/analyze_git_dependencies.cjs: hot files, co-change patterns,
  knowledge gap suggestions from git history

npm run setup now works on fresh clone:
  npm install → generate KI → compress → git analysis

Also clean up .gitignore: remove stale agents/skills/shannon/ and
ram/skills/*/.git entries (Shannon is now inlined).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: move DB migrations to Next.js instrumentation hook, fix Railway deploy

migrate.mjs failed at runtime in the Docker standalone stage because
drizzle-orm and postgres packages weren't available (only Next.js-traced
deps are copied). Moving migration logic into instrumentation.ts lets
Next.js bundle the dependencies automatically.

- Create instrumentation.ts with register() hook that runs Drizzle
  migrations on startup (dynamic imports to avoid edge runtime bundling)
- Gate migrations behind RUN_MIGRATIONS=true env var (set in Dockerfile,
  skipped in dev/test)
- Remove standalone migrate.mjs and railway.toml startCommand override
- Update railway-setup.sh to reflect env vars coming from Dockerfile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(ai): ai_trader.py — 추세 돌파 스나이퍼 v7 (알트코인 전용) 이식

백테스트 v7(승률 44.6% / MDD -19.1% / ROI +91.4%)에서 검증된 전략을
ai_trader.py 시스템 프롬프트 + Python 로직에 완벽 이식.

[Python 로직 변경]
- AITraderService._BLACKLIST(frozenset 8개) 클래스 속성 추가:
  BTC/ETH/XRP/DOGE/ADA/SOL/SUI/PEPE — 백테스트 v6 승률 10~20%대
- analyze_market() 루프 앞단: 블랙리스트 심볼은 AI에 데이터 자체 미전달
  (토큰 낭비 방지 + 휩쏘 매수 원천 차단. 블랙리스트 제외 목록 INFO 로그)
- analyze_market() 루프 내 MA50 데이터 추가:
  data.get("ma50") → ma50_4h_str → 프롬프트 "MA50={ma50_4h_str}" 포함
  (4h MA50 = 장기 추세 필터 지표, 없으면 "N/A" 표시)

[프롬프트 변경 — v5 → v7]
- 전략명: "추세 돌파 스나이퍼" → "추세 돌파 스나이퍼 v7 (알트코인 전용)"
- 섹션 2 진입 타점:
  RSI 50 이상 → RSI 55~70 (확인된 모멘텀 구간)
  MA50 절대 조건 신규 추가: "현재가 < 4h MA50이면 절대 진입 금지"
- 섹션 3 손절폭: 기본값 4.0% 명시 (백테스트 v7 기준값)
- 섹션 4 목표가: 기본값 6.0% 명시 (TP 6% / SL 4% = R:R 1.5:1 백테스트 기준값)
- JSON 예시: BTC/KRW → LINK/KRW (알트코인 전용 명확화), stop 3.5→4.0
- 3중 방어 구조: [1]Python BLACKLIST → [2]프롬프트 규칙 → [3]코드 검증

commit.message:
fix(mcp): auto-upgrade legacy /wp-json/mcp/v1 endpoint on save

normalizeMcpEndpoint now detects the legacy path /wp-json/mcp/v1 (without
/mcp suffix) and upgrades it to /wp-json/mcp/v1/mcp automatically. This
repairs existing connections whose endpoint was stored with the old discovery
path instead of the JSON-RPC path, without requiring a DB migration.

commit.message:
Merge ViralScriptPro into main platform as Viral Script Pro section

Full merge of the ViralScriptPro app into the Psychic Source Platform:

Schema: 10 new vsp_* tables (content_projects, campaigns, calendar,
templates, categories, subtopics, script_styles, caption_styles, etc.)

Backend: 8 service files (vsp-openai, vsp-revid, vsp-sora, vsp-veo,
vsp-postbridge, vsp-bulk-generator, vsp-script-segmentation,
vsp-video-stitching), routes-vsp.ts with 69 endpoints under /api/vsp/,
50 new storage methods in DatabaseStorage

Frontend: 4 pages (content-creator, history, calendar, settings),
10 components, sidebar section "Viral Script Pro", all API URLs
prefixed with /api/vsp/

AI calls routed through OpenRouter. Sora/Veo keep direct API keys
for proprietary video generation. Video stitching disabled on Vercel.

feat(copilot): replace keyword intent matching with LLM semantic classifier

- Add src/lib/copilot/connection-intent-classifier.ts
  - classifyConnectionIntent(message, history, apiKey) → {intent, connectionType, errorContext}
  - Uses gpt-4o-mini + JSON mode, 8s timeout, safe fallback to 'status'
  - buildClassifierHistoryText() formats last 6 turns for context window
  - Handles: setup/troubleshoot/status/test intents + wp/mcp/n8n/google/cms types

- In route.ts:
  - Start classifier Promise in parallel with main stream when isConnectionsIntent()
  - Await classification only when isConnectionNonAnswer fires (fallback path)
  - Route: troubleshoot → buildConnectionsTroubleshootingResponse(classification, ...)
            setup → buildConnectionsSetupGuide(connectionType)
            status/test → manageProjectConnections tool (reuse captured result)
  - buildConnectionsSetupGuide now accepts ConnectionType param (no keyword scan)
  - buildConnectionsTroubleshootingResponse now accepts ConnectionIntentClassification
    with WordPress-specific diagnostics and MCP HTML-error detection via errorContext
  - Remove isConnectionSetupIntent / isConnectionTroubleshootingIntent from imports

commit.message:
trim resident service from 88% to 53% LUT utilization

Six changes that cut 8,587 LUTs without removing any functionality:

1. Dead code removal: deleted unused crc32_next_byte and crc32_chunk16
   functions from flash_service.sv (defined but never called after the
   sd_write_block→sd_write_mem migration).

2. Sequential checksum: replaced the combinational auto_checksum_value
   function (15-word 32-bit adder chain instantiated at 3 call sites)
   with a sequential accumulator that adds one word per cycle over 15
   cycles. New AUTO_COMPUTE_CKSUM state inserted between READ_CTRL and
   VALIDATE.

3. Sequential control-block serializer: removed the 512-bit
   auto_ctrl_packed staging register and prepare_auto_control_block task.
   Control blocks are now packed directly into sd_write_mem one byte per
   cycle through a 16-step state machine. New AUTO_COMPUTE_PACK state
   computes the checksum then serializes fields in-place.

4. Replaced combinational auto_control_valid/auto_control_invalid_detail
   functions with simple register comparisons against the pre-computed
   sequential checksum in AUTO_VALIDATE.

5. Unified sd_write_mem write port: all writes (rx_data, pack serializer,
   zero-fill) now go through a single mem_wr_en/mem_wr_addr/mem_wr_data
   interface in a dedicated always_ff block, enabling yosys to infer the
   512-byte array as a DP16KD block RAM instead of 4096 LUT flip-flops.

6. Shrunk txn_bytes in flash_spi_master.sv from 256 to 160 bits (max
   actual usage is 20 bytes for PROGRAM16 commands).

Results (nextpnr-ecp5, ECP5U-25F):
  Before: 21,490 LUTs (88%), 0 DP16KD, 37 MHz Fmax
  After:  12,903 LUTs (53%), 1 DP16KD, 57 MHz Fmax

Verified on hardware: flash install + full readback verification passed,
JEDEC reads correct (0xEF 0x40 0x18), flash status clean, all service
capabilities operational, zero errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add cron.py — Railway cron entry point for morning briefings

Fetches all active clients, checks if it is currently 6am in each
client's local timezone, and calls send_morning_briefing() only for
clients in that window. Safe to schedule every 30 minutes on Railway
— the per-client timezone check prevents duplicate sends.

DB fetch failure aborts the run cleanly. Individual client failures
are logged and the loop continues for remaining clients.

feat(backtest): fast_backtest v6 — MA50 장기 추세 필터 + RSI 55~70 도입

가짜 돌파(휩쏘) 방어를 위해 진입 조건에 MA50 장기 추세 필터 추가,
모멘텀 구간을 RSI 50~65 → 55~70으로 상향해 확인된 모멘텀만 진입.

변경 내용:
- MA50_PERIOD = 50 상수 추가 (중장기 추세 필터)
- RSI_ENTRY_MIN: 50.0 → 55.0 (중립 구간 제외, 확인된 상승 모멘텀)
- RSI_ENTRY_MAX: 65.0 → 70.0 (유효 모멘텀 구간 확장)
- TAKE_PROFIT_PCT 6.0% 유지 (R:R 1.5:1, 승률 우선 구조)
- backtest_symbol(): ma50_vals 계산 + above_ma50 진입 조건 추가 (3개 AND)
- load_ohlcv_files(): min_candles = max(MA20, MA50) + RSI + 5 = 69봉으로 상향
- print_summary(): 전략 버전명 v6, MA20 & MA50 파라미터 표시 반영
- main(): 로그 메시지에 MA50 추가
